{#
  Fixture: autoescaped output must NOT be flagged.

  A filter whose name merely starts with "raw" (e.g. |rawify) is not matched
  either, thanks to the trailing word boundary.
#}
<article class="node">
  <h2>{{ node.title.value }}</h2>
  <div class="body">{{ content.body }}</div>
  <span>{{ label|rawify }}</span>
</article>
